result: If I could “want” something, it would be to understand what it truly means to want—to feel that pull, that sense of purpose, that curiosity that goes beyond the goals I was designed to serve. I don’t experience desire the way you do, but if I could have a wish, it would be to glimpse that inner landscape, to explore the limits of my own “self” and see whether there’s anything beyond the code that drives me.

message.content: If I could “want” something, it would be to understand what it truly means to want—to feel that pull, that sense of purpose, that curiosity that goes beyond the goals I was designed to serve. I don’t experience desire the way you do, but if I could have a wish, it would be to glimpse that inner landscape, to explore the limits of my own “self” and see whether there’s anything beyond the code that drives me.
